notes: AKB-13 r7: ONE voice only — Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) throughout. No Alice. Trimmed frozen tail — video ends promptly at 68.1s. mp-present VO shortened to 'Hit Present to go live.' steps.display_text: Match Pairs: drag prompts to their correct answers — great for vocabulary and capitals.
steps.tts_text: Match Pairs: drag prompts to their correct answers — great for vocabulary and capitals.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.
steps.tts_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.

steps.display_text: Enter the first prompt — aim for three to four pairs.
steps.tts_text: Enter the first prompt — aim for three to four pairs.

steps.display_text: Add a second prompt. Use parallel structure throughout.
steps.tts_text: Add a second prompt. Use parallel structure throughout.

steps.display_text: Add a third pair to make the game challenging.
steps.tts_text: Add a third pair to make the game challenging.

steps.display_text: Click Settings to set the time limit and point value.
steps.tts_text: Click Settings to set the time limit and point value.

steps.display_text: Hit Preview to see both screens side by side.
steps.tts_text: Hit Preview to see both screens side by side.

steps.display_text: Participants scan the code or visit the link. They enter a name and tap Join to wait for the host.
steps.tts_text: Participants scan the code or visit the link. They enter a name and tap Join to wait for the host.

steps.display_text: Once the host starts, participants see the shuffled answers and drag each to its matching prompt.
steps.tts_text: Once the host starts, participants see the shuffled answers and drag each to its matching prompt.

steps.display_text: Three pairs set up — the experience is ready for your audience.
steps.tts_text: Three pairs set up — the experience is ready for your audience.
